title: Donald Trump leads Joe Biden by 6 points in new national poll
shortDescription: Forty-nine percent of registered voters plan to vote for Trump in the 2024 election, compared to Biden's 43%.

title: J.D. Vance says he hasn't spoken to Trump about possible VP pick
shortDescription: The Ohio Senator is rumored to be on Trump's short list of running mate picks.

title: Donald Trump meets privately with Ron DeSantis in Florida about 2024 election
shortDescription: After the DeSantis withdrew from the 2024 race in January, Trump and aides said they hoped to tap the governor’s fundraising operation.

title: Israel agrees not to invade Rafah until US leaders share concerns, Biden official says
shortDescription: Rafah is currently home to more than one million Palestinian civilians and is the last Hamas stronghold in Gaza, according to Israel.

title: Graham says Americans will vote on 'their problems,' not Trump's criminal cases
shortDescription: "People are looking at their problems, not Trump's legal problems," Graham said.

title: 5 takeaways from Joe Biden’s interview with Howard Stern
shortDescription: President Joe Biden differentiated himself from Donald Trump on Ukraine, Jan. 6, and abortion as he prepares to debate him.

title: Joe Biden targets Donald Trump at correspondents' dinner: 3 takeaways
shortDescription: President Joe Biden joked about his age and Donald Trump's criminal trials at Saturday's White House Correspondents Association dinner.

title: Biden speaks at Correspondents' Dinner
shortDescription: President Joe Biden roasted Donald Trump at the White House Correspondents' Dinner while also highlighting the "seriousness" of the 2024 election.

title: Abortion travel gets more complicated with state ballot measures
shortDescription: This year's election could have widespread effects on the abortion access map and traveling for the procedure.

title: Democrats fear chaos of 1968 as they gear up for Chicago convention
shortDescription: The violence of the 1968 Democratic convention in Chicago has haunted the party for a half-century. Could it happen again in August?

title: Trump is attacking RFK Jr. for taking support from in 2024 election
shortDescription: Donald Trump said on his Truth Social website that a vote for RFKJr. would essentially be a 'wasted protest vote'

title: GOP lawsuits target absentee ballots, voter rolls in swing states
shortDescription: The Republican Party is not always successful in bringing lawsuits, but the subjects are far-reaching, and their breadth is ambitious.

title: Why President Biden scrapped the 'Bidenomics' talk
shortDescription: President Joe Biden has stopped using "Bidenomics" in public remarks after the term fell flat with voters and even fellow Democrats.

title: Image falsely linked to Columbia protest over war in Gaza | Fact check
shortDescription: The photo of the flyer has been circulating on social media since March, more than a month before an encampment protest began at Columbia University.

title: White House condemns Columbia protest leader's call for Zionists to die
shortDescription: Columbia University student Kyhmani James apologized for saying "Zionists don't deserve to die." The White House condemned the remarks.

title: D.C. police union blames police-reform law for dismissal of 12 cops
shortDescription: The local police union said 21 officers would not have their contracts renewed come April 30. Twelve of those were thanks to a controversial law, they said.

title: President Biden says he is happy to debate Trump
shortDescription: President Biden told radio talk show host Howard Stern Friday that he plans to debate Donald Trump in the 2024 campaign.
